name: Wuxi Paike New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Paike New Materials Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells forgings in China. The company's principal products include ring forgings and various types of free forgings. It offers forgings for chemical and petroleum, machinery, valve, power, marine, and high end products. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Wuxi, China.
